title: スプリンターズSの後に・次は満腹！

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Hishi Akebono didn't get first place... But wow...

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Sh-she's huge! And the force and speed she ran
with was terrifying!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
You can say that again! I got some awesome
shots! Now I feel bad for joking about wanting to
get funny pics of her...

text_block_list.name: Bono Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Bono is usually so easygoing, but that intensity
and focus she has on the racetrack is so cool!

text_block_list.name: Bono Fan B
text_block_list.text:
For sure. I think I'll go see her next race too! I
might be hooked!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Trainer, I was sooo close!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I'm disappointed, but... I'm glad I got to run hard
with everybody.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
And the fans seemed to have had a good time
too, with all their cheering and applause...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: I think I can do better in the next race.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: All right, what should I run next, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I hope the next race will make me even fuller than
today!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Akebono's proven that her body is strong
enough for her to hold her own, even in G1
sprints.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Which means winning a G1 mile race should be
our next goal!
choice_data_list: Let's aim for the Mile Championship!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Oh! That one's a big race, isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I bet there will be even stronger racers there!
Maybe I can run against Biko again too!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Oooh! Yes, I definitely want to run in that one!
Let's do it, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That said, going directly from a sprint to a G1
mile race has me a bit worried.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To be safe, I'd like to have her run in a bigger
race first. Something around 1,400 meters would
be good.
choice_data_list: Let's squeeze in the Swan Stakes first, though.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
That sounds good to me! Swans, huh? They're
such nice and big birds.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a bit of discussion, our next goal is set. Now
that we're ready to get the ball rolling...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Huh? Biko? What's wrong?

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Sigh... You were really impressive, Bono.

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Even though you didn't place first, everyone was so
shocked by your running, and their eyes were glittering
as they watched you...

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Yet, I... I...

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Nooo! I can't get all sad now! A crestfallen hero is
no hero at all!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Stand up, Biko Pegasus! Never give in!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text: Raaah!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: ...Biko.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Don't tell anyone what you just saw, okay,
Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meanwhile, a bright and powerful racer from the
United States lurks nearby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Standing alone next to the nearly empty stands
and trembling violently is Taiki Shuttle.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: This is so excitin'!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
What a wonderful gal that Hishi Akebono is! She's
big and strong—and absolutely thrillin' to watch!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: I... I wanna run in a big race with her!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All sorts of emotions are running high as the
Sprinters S. comes to a close.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Next is the Swan S. Now's the time to ramp up our
training so Hishi Akebono can really spread her
wings and take flight!
